body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Simple TWAMP (STAMP) Extensions for Segment Routing Networks
Special Features & Open Discussion:  “Test Protocol for One-way IP  Capacity Measurement”
One-way Delay Measurement Based on Reference Delay (one slide for draft-li-ippm-ref-delay-measurement-01)
One-way Delay Measurement Based on Deterministic Networking(one slide for draft-li-ippm-deterministic-owd-measurement-00)
Enhanced Alternate Marking Method (draft zhou ippm enhanced alternate marking 07)
Linux Kernel IOAM Implementation Update and In Situ OAM Profile for the Linux Kernel Implementation
Simple Two-Way Direct Loss Measurement Procedure
Self-Contained Alternate-Marking Mechanism for Performance Monitoring in High-Quality Network
Postcard-based On-Path Flow Data Telemetry using Packet Marking (PBT-M)
